description_long: This object is a whole Hass avocado with a dark, bumpy, and textured skin, typical of the variety. The surface is predominantly a deep greenish-brown, with some lighter and darker mottling, and the skin appears thick and rugged. At the top, a small, circular stem remnant is visible, slightly protruding from the apex. The overall shape is pear-like, tapering gently from a broad base to a narrower top. The skin shows some minor natural blemishes and irregularities, but no major scars or damage. The avocado is isolated against a plain white background, with no visible context or supporting surface.
description: A whole, dark-skinned Hass avocado with a bumpy, textured surface and a visible stem remnant, isolated on a white background.
description_view_0: The avocado is seen from a side angle, showing its pear-like shape and rough, dark skin with subtle color variations.
description_view_1: This view highlights the top of the avocado, with the small, circular stem remnant clearly visible at the apex.
description_view_2: The opposite side of the avocado is shown, with a smoother, less detailed surface and no visible stem.
description_view_3: The base of the avocado is visible, showing a rounded, slightly flattened bottom with consistent skin texture.
